display.purpose: Page-level hero headlines only, at most one per view.

title.purpose: Card-level titles (org card, event title, feature card).

body.purpose: All prose: descriptions, taglines, chat messages.

label.purpose: Mono. Uppercase eyebrows, sidebar section labels, badges, ticker text.

shadows.name: resting-card
shadows.purpose: Default state for any white card.

shadows.name: elevated
shadows.purpose: Pronounced hover states and open dropdown menus.

shadows.name: modal
shadows.purpose: Overlays, modal-style pickers, the landing sample-question card.

shadows.name: primary-cta-glow
shadows.purpose: Resting glow on primary buttons only — the one exception to flat-by-default.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: The only easing curve used in the system. No bounce, no elastic.

motion.name: ticker-scroll
motion.purpose: Landing page event ticker marquee; paused on hover, disabled under reduced-motion.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single primary CTA style — Signal fill, white text, resting glow.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #006f71; color: #fff; font-weight: 700; font-size: 14px; padding: 13px 26px; border: none; border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(0,111,113,0.35); cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1), transform 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #00585a; transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 6px 22px rgba(0,111,113,0.42); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #006f71; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(0); box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,111,113,0.35); }

components.name: Org Card
components.description: Large selectable card (the org picker's FBLA/DECA/HOSA cards) — flat at rest, lifts and shadows on hover.
components.css: .ds-org-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-start; gap: 10px; padding: 30px 24px 26px; background: #ffffff; border: 1.5px solid #d7e0e0; border-radius: 16px; text-align: left; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 1px 3px rgba(6,20,20,0.06), 0 1px 2px rgba(6,20,20,0.04); transition: transform 250ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1), box-shadow 250ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1), border-color 250ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .ds-org-card:hover { transform: translateY(-5px); border-color: #43c3c3; box-shadow: 0 12px 40px rgba(6,20,20,0.12), 0 4px 12px rgba(6,20,20,0.06); } .ds-org-card-icon { width: 52px; height: 52px; border-radius: 12px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 24px; background: linear-gradient(135deg,#1d4ed8,#3b82f6); box-shadow: 0 6px 18px rgba(0,0,0,0.16); } .ds-org-card-name { font-family: 'Inter Tight', sans-serif; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 800; color: #061414; } .ds-org-card-tag { font-size: 13px; color: #586766; line-height: 1.55; } .ds-org-card-cta { font-size: 12.5px; font-weight: 700; color: #006f71; }

components.name: Sidebar Nav Item (active)
components.description: The active-state treatment for a Command Deck sidebar nav item — diagonal Signal wash, inset ring, never a solid fill or left-border stripe.
components.css: .ds-sidebar-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; width: 100%; text-align: left; padding: 7px 10px; border: none; background: transparent; border-radius: 7px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 12.5px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5); transition: background 120ms, color 120ms; } .ds-sidebar-item:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.07); color: rgba(255,255,255,0.85); } .ds-sidebar-item-active { background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(0,140,142,0.24), rgba(0,140,142,0.1)); box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(0,140,142,0.3); color: #43c3c3; font-weight: 600; } .ds-sidebar-item-dot { width: 5px; height: 5px; border-radius: 50%; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.14); flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-sidebar-item-active .ds-sidebar-item-dot { background: #00a7a9; box-shadow: 0 0 6px rgba(0,140,142,0.7); }

components.name: Quiz Option (correct/incorrect states)
components.description: Full-width answer option with three revealed states: correct (green), wrong (red), dimmed (everything else). Shared exactly between the app's real quiz and the landing page's interactive sample question.
components.html: BDebit Accounts Receivable, Credit Sales
components.css: .ds-quiz-option { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 14px 16px; border: 1.5px solid #d7e0e0; border-radius: 8px; background: #ffffff; font-size: 14px; color: #273636; transition: all 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .ds-quiz-option-letter { width: 26px; height: 26px; border-radius: 50%; background: #eaf0f0; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-weight: 700; font-size: 12px; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-quiz-option-correct { border-color: #b2e7bc; background: #e8fbeb; color: #0a7e3a; font-weight: 600; } .ds-quiz-option-correct .ds-quiz-option-letter { background: #0a7e3a; color: #fff; } .ds-quiz-option-wrong { border-color: #ffc6c0; background: #fff0ee; color: #c92f33; font-weight: 600; } .ds-quiz-option-wrong .ds-quiz-option-letter { background: #c92f33; color: #fff; } .ds-quiz-option-dimmed { opacity: 0.4; }

components.name: Org Switcher Dropdown
components.description: The Command Deck's signature interaction: an inline dark dropdown for switching organizations without leaving the current view.
components.css: .ds-org-switcher-btn { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 9px; width: 100%; padding: 7px 10px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04); color: rgba(255,255,255,0.75); font-weight: 600; font-size: 12.5px; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms, border-color 150ms; } .ds-org-switcher-btn:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.09); border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.18); } .ds-org-switcher-menu { margin-top: 6px; background: #142a2c; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); border-radius: 10px; padding: 6px; box-shadow: 0 16px 36px rgba(0,0,0,0.45); } .ds-org-switcher-item { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; width: 100%; padding: 8px; border: none; background: transparent; border-radius: 7px; cursor: pointer; text-align: left; } .ds-org-switcher-item-active { background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(0,140,142,0.24), rgba(0,140,142,0.1)); } .ds-org-switcher-item-name { font-size: 12.5px; font-weight: 700; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.92); } .ds-org-switcher-item-meta { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 10.5px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.4); }

components.name: Event Ticker
components.description: Landing-page-only marquee streaming real event names from all three orgs, tagged by org color. Market-ticker motif carried through mono type and a trend glyph, not a second brand color.
components.css: .ds-ticker { position: relative; overflow: hidden; background: #010b0d; padding: 13px 0; } .ds-ticker-track { display: flex; width: max-content; animation: ds-ticker-scroll 46s linear infinite; } .ds-ticker:hover .ds-ticker-track { animation-play-state: paused; } @keyframes ds-ticker-scroll { from { transform: translateX(0); } to { transform: translateX(-50%); } } .ds-ticker-item { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 9px; padding: 0 26px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 12.5px; font-weight: 600; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.75); white-space: nowrap; border-right: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); } .ds-ticker-arrow { color: #0a7e3a; font-size: 10px; } .ds-ticker-org { font-size: 9.5px; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: 0.5px; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 2px 6px; border-radius: 4px; background: rgba(0,140,142,0.22); color: #43c3c3; } .ds-ticker-name { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.9); }

components.name: Interactive Sample Question
components.description: Landing-hero widget — the same browser-chrome mockup shell as before, but genuinely clickable and reusing the real Quiz Option component states, so the hero's promise matches the actual product.
components.html:
Accounting › Journalizing

Try it — question 3 of 10

Which journal entry correctly records a credit sale on account?
components.css: .ds-sample-q { max-width: 420px; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #eaf0f0; border-radius: 16px; box-shadow: 0 24px 64px rgba(6,20,20,0.16), 0 8px 24px rgba(6,20,20,0.08); overflow: hidden; } .ds-sample-q-topbar { padding: 12px 18px; background: #eaf0f0; border-bottom: 1px solid #d7e0e0; } .ds-sample-q-tab { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; color: #586766; } .ds-sample-q-body { padding: 26px; } .ds-sample-q-label { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.6px; text-transform: uppercase; color: #006f71; margin-bottom: 12px; } .ds-sample-q-question { font-size: 16.5px; font-weight: 700; color: #061414; line-height: 1.4; }

narrative.overview: StudyStock splits into two halves that never blur together: a near-black command sidebar that handles navigation, organization switching, and event selection, and a bright, quiet workspace where the actual studying happens. One teal Signal color crosses both halves — it marks exactly one thing at a time and nothing else competes with it for attention. This replaced an earlier indigo/violet/fuchsia gradient system deliberately, since that combination reads as generic AI-SaaS. The marketing landing page runs as a brand-register surface per-task (PRODUCT.md's per-surface override) with a market/investing narrative — StudyStock = Study + Stock — carried through a live event ticker and an interactive sample question, reusing the same Signal teal and semantic green rather than a second brand color. The system explicitly rejects generic ed-tech SaaS, the default Next.js/Tailwind template look, glassmorphism, corporate-Memphis blobs, and cartoonish gamification.
keyCharacteristics: Two-zone layout: dark command sidebar, light content workspace — never inverted, never merged.
One accent color, used sparingly. Signal teal means "this is active" or "this is the primary action," nowhere else.
Flat at rest, shadow on interaction. Depth is earned by state, not applied decoratively.
Precise, structural components — crisp borders, small fast hovers, no bounce or elastic motion.
Mono type carries every count, badge, and ticker line — an instrument-panel detail used throughout, not sparingly.
The landing page is a brand-register exception that still reuses the app's one accent — market/ticker concept, not a second palette.

rules.name: The One Signal Rule
rules.body: Signal teal appears on at most one element per view at rest. It never decorates static content.

rules.name: The Gradient Containment Rule
rules.body: The teal→green→blue gradient is reserved for large dark hero surfaces only — never a button, badge, card, or small element, including on the landing page.

rules.name: The One Display Rule
rules.body: Exactly one Display-scale headline per screen. A second large headline downgrades to Headline scale.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: No box-shadow on any element at rest except cards (sm only) and primary buttons (a deliberate glow exception). Everything else earns its shadow through hover, focus, or an open/active state.

dos: Do keep the sidebar Deep Space Navy and the workspace Cool Paper — the two-zone split is the system's structure, not a decoration.
Do use Signal teal for exactly one active/primary element per view; everywhere else, stay neutral.
Do keep every card flat at rest (sm shadow only) and add shadow strictly as hover/focus feedback.
Do use translateY(-2px) + shadow deepening as the standard hover lift — fast (150ms), ease-out, no bounce.
Do reserve the teal→green→blue gradient for large dark hero surfaces only.
Do lean on JetBrains Mono for counts, badges, and ticker text.
Do show all three organizations (FBLA, DECA, HOSA) as equal-weight entry points on the landing page — HOSA marked "coming soon," never hidden.
donts: Don't ship a generic ed-tech SaaS screen — no stock-photo hero imagery, no multi-step onboarding wizard, no marketing-speak copy.
Don't introduce mascots, streak badges, confetti, or other gamification chrome.
Don't apply a resting shadow to any element besides cards and primary buttons.
Don't use the gradient, or more than one Signal element, decoratively on a single small component.
Don't use bounce/elastic easing anywhere — every transition uses ease-out (cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1)).
Don't default the landing page to the generic Next.js/Tailwind SaaS template look — centered headline, gradient wash, floating browser mockup, nothing else.
Don't use glassmorphism, corporate-Memphis blob illustrations, or an unstructured three-card feature row as the landing page's primary device.
Don't introduce a second brand color for the landing page's market/ticker concept — reuse Signal teal and semantic green.
